business_ideas.idea: Creator e-commerce: niche audience creators launching 2-sided marketplaces for products
Epic Gardening: farm beds, seeds, and courses for home gardeners
Cars and Bids: peer-to-peer car auction marketplace built by enthusiast Doug DeMuro
Jonathan KatzMoses woodworking tools sold D2C, specialized for craftspeople
Five Marys Ranch: ethical meat, tallow, courses, whiskey from creator-built brand
AMMO NYC: premium car detailing products and services for collectors
Jocko Fuel: sports drinks and supplements sold in Walmart with creator credibility
Go Clean Co: cleaning products and systems by lifestyle creator Sarah McAllister
Everyday carry products: knives, wallets, tactical gear for 2A enthusiasts
T-Rex Arms: tactical gear and firearms accessories with cult following
Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu Fanatics: 2-sided marketplace for instructors and students
The Iron Snail: designer clothing brand launched by film-school creator
Project Air: RC engineering kits and courses for hobbyists
Next Admit: college essay editing and SAT prep by MIT creator Gohar Khan
Hacksmith: premium multitool and novelty sabers with 15M YouTube audience
Tone Ster Paints: paint blending and custom colors launched on TikTok

predictions.text: Creator-built businesses scale to $100M+ when founder builds brand authority for 5+ years
Video and audio platforms are primary vehicles for venture-scale creator businesses
Everyday carry and niche enthusiast categories have massive B2C potential
